win_condition: After Age III and military conflict resolution, the player with the highest total victory points wins.
tiebreaker: If tied on points, tied player with more coins wins; if still tied, shared victory.

categories.label: Military Tokens
categories.description: Add positive and negative military conflict tokens from all three ages.

categories.label: Treasury Coins
categories.description: Score 1 VP per 3 coins remaining at game end.

categories.label: Wonder Stages
categories.description: Victory points printed on completed wonder stages.

categories.label: Commercial, Guild, and Science
categories.description: Yellow, purple, and green card scoring, including science set/symbol math.
